Mechanical Definition / Rule Parameter: Effect originates from and acts exclusively upon the activating entity's physical position[cite: 1].
Effect can only be transferred via direct physical contact with an entity occupying the same zone[cite: 1].
Effect targets an entity, object, or surface within the exact same abstract zone as the origin[cite: 1].
Effect can project across a boundary to target an entity or zone exactly 1 step away[cite: 1].
Effect can project across boundaries up to a fixed integer number of zones away, governed by a stat or item tag[cite: 1].
Effect isolates and applies its modification to exactly one distinct entity or health pool within the valid range.
Effect blankets the target abstract zone, applying to all physical terrain, structures, or creatures inside[cite: 1].
Effect scales structurally to blanket the target zone plus all adjacent zones connected to it simultaneously[cite: 1].
Effect shifts the baseline environment or rules parameters across the entire active micro battleground layout[cite: 1].
Limits the structural changes or modifications strictly to the activating individual's character sheet[cite: 1].
Filters the modification to apply exclusively to the minion squad currently commanded by the activating Boss PC[cite: 1].
Filters the modification to apply exclusively to any friendly-aligned minion squad within the delivery footprint[cite: 1].
Restricts the effect to manifest only on allied player characters and friendly minion squads, ignoring hostiles[cite: 1].
Restricts the effect to manifest only on hostile targets, bypassing allied entities occupying the same footprint[cite: 1].
Applies the payload collectively to any single entire mob squad (all health dice) inside the delivery footprint[cite: 1].
Applies the payload collectively across several distinct mob squads caught within the delivery footprint[cite: 1].
